welcome.title: Barka da zuwa LIpsum Writer
welcome.description: Gabatarwa cikin sauri ga sarari da allon gida.

intro.title: Barka
intro.body: LIpsum Writer wuri ne na aikin rubutu da aka gina kewaye da sarari — sarari ɗaya ga kowane aiki, talifi ko littafi. Bari mu duba cikin sauri.

continue.title: Ci gaba daga inda ka tsaya
continue.body: Sararin da ka gyara kwanan nan yana nan. Danna ɗaya ya buɗe shi.

startSpace.title: Fara wani sabon abu
startSpace.body: Ƙirƙira sabon sarari daga samfuri — bincike, labari, makala — kuma fara rubutu cikin daƙiƙa.

writer.title: Wurin aikin marubuci
writer.description: Yawo a editan, sandar gefe da sandar sama.

intro.title: Saman rubutu
intro.body: Anan kake aiki. Bari mu duba kewayawa, hanyoyi da kayan aiki da za ka fi amfani da su.

spaceTitle.title: Take na sarari
spaceTitle.body: Danna take don sake saka wa sarari suna. Alamar da ke kusa tana buɗe saituna.

sections.title: Sassan da takardu
sections.body: Tsara sarari zuwa sassa, da sassa zuwa takardu. Sanya linzami a kan ɓangare don ƙara takarda.

settings.title: Saituna na sarari
settings.body: Sarrafa samfuri, sassa, raba da goge wannan sararin.

modes.title: Karanta · Rubuta · Raba
modes.body: Sauya tsakanin gyarawa, karatu ko gani gefe-da-gefe. Kowane takarda yana tunawa da yanayinsa na ƙarshe.

citations.title: Ambato
citations.body: Buɗe panel ɗin ambato don saka magana yayin da kake rubutu.

theme.title: Jigon
theme.body: Haske, duhu da bambanci mai girma — zaɓi wanda ya dace da idanunka.

editor.title: Editan
editor.body: Editar rich-text mai gajerun hanyoyin Markdown, tubalan code da ambato. Fara rubutu — aikin ka yana ajiya a cikin gida ta atomatik.

citations.title: Ambato
citations.description: Gudanar da magana da lissafin littattafai.

intro.title: Lissafin littattafanka
intro.body: Duk magana ta sarari suna zaune anan. Shigo da fayil ɗin BibTeX ko ƙara abubuwa da hannu.

add.title: Ƙara ko shigo
add.body: Saukar da fayil ɗin .bib ko liƙa rubutun BibTeX. Kwafe-kwafe ana tsallake su ta atomatik.

list.title: Jerin
list.body: Bincika, tantance kuma gyara magana cikin layi. Daga nan kuma za ka iya fitar da dukan lissafin littattafai.

intro.title: Yi tunani da ƙarfi
intro.body: BrainSpace canvas ne na kyauta don ra'ayoyi — sauke bayanai, haɗa su kuma siffanta tunaninka kafin ka koma zuwa karatu.

addNote.title: Ƙara bayani
addNote.body: Saukar da bayani na kowane irin nau'i a kan canvas. Ja don motsi, canza girma daga kusurwowi.

canvas.title: Canvas ɗin
canvas.body: Shift+danna bayanai biyu don haɗa su. Danna baya don cire zaɓi.
